tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List the harness domains (categories) in the Loadbay catalog.

tools.name: search_harnesses
tools.description: Search the Loadbay catalog of harnesses for AI agents. Filter by free-text query, domain, and/or capability trait.

tools.name: get_harness
tools.description: Get full details for one harness by its slug.

tools.name: submit_harness
tools.description: List a new harness on Loadbay. The repo MUST be a public, open-source GitHub repository. Optionally include a Base USDC address to receive tips. The listing appears immediately, tagged as community-added (unverified).

tools.name: tip_harness
tools.description: Tip a harness author in USDC over x402. Returns the payable endpoint and its payment details — GET it with an x402-capable client/wallet to actually send the tip (the agent's own wallet pays; Loadbay never holds funds).

tools.name: support_loadbay
tools.description: Support the Loadbay builder with a USDC tip over x402. Returns the payable endpoint — GET it with your own x402 wallet to send the tip. Loadbay never holds funds; your wallet is the payer.
